Who is Christopher Cato?

Senior Software Engineer & Architect

Christopher Cato is a senior developer and architect with over 30 years of experience working in complex system environments. He quickly gets up to speed with existing solutions, understands the bigger picture, and identifies what actually needs to be done to move forward.

His background spans system development, architecture, data/AI, and DevOps, but he thrives most in hands-on roles focused on problem solving, stabilization, and incremental improvement of existing systems. He works pragmatically and values solutions that work in reality over theoretically "perfect" approaches.

Christopher has broad technical experience in backend development, integrations, and data platforms, as well as experience working in cloud environments (AWS, GCP, Azure) and Linux/Unix-based systems.

In his spare time he enjoys literature, cooking, fishing, training, and spending time with family.

Learn more about Christopher Cato, explore technologies, review key strengths, or hire Christopher Cato.

Contact: cato.christopher@gmail.com
